title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Protocol Clinic: Net Dns Security Privacy
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dns security privacy increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain DNSSEC authenticity and DoH or DoT transport privacy without claiming either provides every property.
Distinguish forward and reverse, primary and secondary, authoritative and non-authoritative, recursive, caching, and hosts-file behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
